title: Bare Bones x Mob Wings (CIT Elytra)
description: Adds unique mob-themed Elytras to the game using CIT matching Bare Bones.
body:
## Bare Bones x Mob Wings
This pack is the official retexture of my resource pack, [Mob Wings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mob-wings), designed to match the style of Bare Bones.

![Elytra](https://i.imgur.com/LwrnEOy.png)



# 🦜 Mob Wings
Enhance your Minecraft experience with this resource pack that adds 11 mob-inspired elytras! Rename your elytra to match one of the flying vanilla mobs, and watch as it transforms into a stunning mob-themed design.

Perfect for anyone looking to add a bit of flair to their wings while staying true to the Bare Bones look and the vanilla feel!






## ✔️ Requirements
This pack uses a modded feature called Custom Item Texture (CIT).

It requires CIT Resewn, OptiFine or alternatives in order to work.

<details>
<summary>📜 Featured mobs and their required renaming</summary>

Allay

Bat

Bee

Blue Parrot

Cyan Parrot

Ender Dragon

Gray Parrot

Green Parrot

Phantom

Red Parrot

Vex

</details>

<details>
<summary>❗Terms of use</summary>

You are allowed to edit the pack for personal use only.

You may include this pack in your modpack, resourcepack or server without needing permission, as long as you give proper credit to the creator 4tobi.

Reselling or reuploading this content on unauthorized websites is strictly forbidden.

The official download sites for this project are Modrinth and CurseForge. Any other websites hosting this content are unauthorized and could potentially include viruses or malware.

</details>
